# backend/core/role_dependency.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:03:10Z

## Purpose
Role dependency · Iter 26 · C1 closure.

Convenience wrappers for FastAPI endpoints to declare role requirements.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `fastapi` import Depends, HTTPException, Request

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `get_current_role(request)`: Read role from RBACMiddleware-set request.state · default 'manager'.
- `require_role()`: Endpoint dependency · 403 if role not in allowed set.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Pre-bound common dependencies
